allow: Bash(sed -i "s/'Poppins', 'SUITE', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif/'Poppins', 'SUITE', sans-serif/g" pages/home.html pages/about.html pages/lectures.html pages/works.html pages/contact.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/'SUITE', 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif/'Poppins', 'SUITE', sans-serif/g" pages/lectures.html pages/works.html pages/contact.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/'Noto Sans KR', 'Inter', sans-serif/'Poppins', 'SUITE', sans-serif/g" admin/index.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;/font-family: 'Poppins', 'SUITE', sans-serif;/g" assets/css/tab-card.css)
Bash(sed -i "s/font-family=\\"'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif\\"/font-family=\\"'Poppins', 'SUITE', sans-serif\\"/g" assets/tab-card.html)
